metadata.title: Pressure
metadata.lyrics:
[00:26.98] You have to learn to pace yourself
[00:31.44] (Pressure)
[00:33.70] You're just like everybody else
[00:37.96] (Pressure)
[00:39.87] You've only had to run so far, so good
[00:45.81] But you will come to a place
[00:50.28] Where the only thing you feel
[00:53.08] Are loaded guns in your face
[00:56.49] And you'll have to deal with pressure
[01:04.74] 
[01:12.31] You used to call me paranoid
[01:16.71] (Pressure)
[01:18.92] But even you cannot avoid
[01:23.39] (Pressure)
[01:25.26] You turn the tap-dance into your crusade
[01:31.82] Now here you are with your faith
[01:35.64] And your Peter Pan advice
[01:38.15] You have no scars on your face
[01:41.61] And you cannot handle pressure
[01:49.79] 
[01:57.52] All grown up and no place to go
[02:03.54] Psych one, psych two
[02:06.81] What do you know?
[02:10.35] All your life is Channel 13
[02:16.42] Sesame Street
[02:19.87] What does it mean?
[02:23.52] 
[02:25.81] I'll tell you what it means
[02:27.63] Pressure, presure
[02:36.52] Don't ask for help, you're all alone
[02:40.64] (Pressure)
[02:42.51] You'll have to answer to your own
[02:47.04] (Pressure)
[02:49.18] I'm sure you have some cosmic rationale
[02:55.50] Well, here you are, in the ninth
[02:59.28] Two men out and three men on
[03:01.78] Nowhere to look, but inside
[03:05.16] Where we all respond to pressure
[03:14.05] Pressure
[03:18.99] 
[03:33.89] All your life is Time Magazine
[03:39.74] I read it too
[03:42.82] What does it mean?
[03:47.28] 
[03:57.10] Pressure!
[03:58.95] I'm sure you have some cosmic rationale
[04:05.12] But here you are with your faith
[04:08.62] And your Peter Pan advice
[04:11.45] You have no scars on your face
[04:14.68] And you cannot handle pressure
[04:23.35] The pressure
[04:29.88] Pressure
[04:34.34] One, two, three, four, pressure!
[04:36.95]
